CC6.1_logical_access.description: The entity implements logical access security over protected information assets
CC6.1_logical_access.control: OPA/Rego policy engine evaluates every agent action against 7 built-in rules

CC7.2_system_monitoring.description: The entity monitors system components for anomalies
CC7.2_system_monitoring.control: eBPF kernel-level observation captures syscalls, file I/O, network connections for all agent processes

CC8.1_change_management.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes
CC8.1_change_management.control: Z3 SMT formal verification proves mathematical correctness of AI-generated code, tool APIs, CLI commands, hardware assembly, and distilled models

CC4.1_monitoring_controls.description: The entity monitors the effectiveness of controls
CC4.1_monitoring_controls.control: HMAC-SHA256 tamper-evident audit chain ensures no event can be modified, deleted, or inserted without detection
